description: As a Quality Assurance Engineer, perform a Statistical Process Control (SPC) analysis on CMP wafer polishing data from ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/wafer_thickness_data.csv, which contains 30 lots with 5 measurements each. Create an X-bar and R control chart analysis that includes Subgroup Means, Subgroup Ranges, the process Grand Mean, and the Average Range. Calculate the Upper and Lower Control Limits for both Mean (X-bar) and Range (R) using the constants provided in ~/Documents/spc_constants_reference.txt. Include an 'Out of Control Flag' column to identify lots where the Subgroup Mean is strictly outside the X-bar control limits. Save the completed analysis to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/wafer_spc_analysis.xlsx.
